title: TestFlight
html: Stub. Apple's beta-distribution channel inside App Store Connect. Yahir uses it for Brotein beta builds; the upload-validation pipeline rejected a build on 2025-06-03 for transparent app icon + bad CFBundleDocumentTypes plist.
